text:
Writing auth logic from scratch every time is a special kind of punishment. We just merged a React auth provider and UI package to the repo (PR #11217). Drop it in, wrap your app, and get back to building the fun parts. Less boilerplate, more making cool stuff. Available on npm and the repo now. 🧱✨
